reasoning: 'How to Train Your Dragon' (2025) is tracking to open around $65M to $100M domestically according to early long-range forecasts from Boxoffice Pro and other industry sources. Given box office realities, a movie tracking under $100M has virtually zero chance of taking the crown for the best domestic opening weekend of the entire year.
